---
title: "07 — DiD Estimation via fect (Multi-Figure)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

```{r libraries}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(fect)
```

## Run fect models for each figure

```{r estimate-all}
fect_methods <- c("ife", "mc", "fe")
n_cores <- max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1)

for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  panel_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_", fig_key, ".parquet"))

  if (!file.exists(panel_path)) {
    message("Panel not found for ", fig$name, ", skipping.")
    next
  }

  message("\n", strrep("=", 60))
  message("DiD estimation for: ", fig$name, " (", fig_key, ")")
  message(strrep("=", 60))

  panel <- as.data.table(read_parquet(panel_path))
  n_treated_units <- uniqueN(panel[!is.na(treat_date), newspaper_id])
  n_control_units <- uniqueN(panel[is.na(treat_date), newspaper_id])
  message("Panel: ", nrow(panel), " rows, ",
          uniqueN(panel$newspaper_id), " newspapers (",
          n_treated_units, " treated, ", n_control_units, " never-treated)")

  if (n_treated_units < 3) {
    message("  WARNING: Only ", n_treated_units, " treated units — fect may fail. Skipping.")
    next
  }

  # --- Fit fect models ---
  for (method in fect_methods) {
    model_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_", method, "_", fig_key, ".rds"))

    if (file.exists(model_path)) {
      message("  ", method, " model already exists, skipping.")
      next
    }

    message("  Fitting fect method=", method, " ...")
    out <- tryCatch({
      fect(
        incivil_rate_rf ~ treated,
        data = as.data.frame(panel),
        index = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
        method = method,
        force = "two-way",
        se = TRUE,
        vartype = "bootstrap",
        nboots = 200,
        parallel = TRUE,
        cores = n_cores,
        seed = SEED
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("    ERROR: ", e$message)
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(out)) {
      saveRDS(out, model_path)
      boot_se <- if (!is.null(out$att.avg.boot) && length(out$att.avg.boot) > 1) {
        sd(out$att.avg.boot)
      } else NA_real_
      message("    ATT = ", round(out$att.avg, 4),
              ", SE = ", round(boot_se, 4))
    }

    rm(out); gc()
  }

  # --- Placebo test (IFE only) ---
  placebo_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_placebo_", fig_key, ".rds"))
  if (!file.exists(placebo_path)) {
    message("  Fitting placebo test ...")
    out_placebo <- tryCatch({
      fect(
        incivil_rate_rf ~ treated,
        data = as.data.frame(panel),
        index = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
        method = "ife",
        force = "two-way",
        se = TRUE,
        vartype = "bootstrap",
        nboots = 200,
        parallel = TRUE,
        cores = n_cores,
        seed = SEED,
        placeboTest = TRUE,
        placebo.period = c(-6, -1)
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("    Placebo ERROR: ", e$message)
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(out_placebo)) {
      saveRDS(out_placebo, placebo_path)
      message("    Placebo saved.")
    }
    rm(out_placebo); gc()
  } else {
    message("  Placebo model already exists, skipping.")
  }

  # --- Robustness: lexicon outcome (IFE only) ---
  lex_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_ife_lexicon_", fig_key, ".rds"))
  if (!file.exists(lex_path)) {
    message("  Fitting IFE with lexicon outcome ...")
    out_lex <- tryCatch({
      fect(
        incivil_rate_lexicon ~ treated,
        data = as.data.frame(panel),
        index = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
        method = "ife",
        force = "two-way",
        se = TRUE,
        vartype = "bootstrap",
        nboots = 200,
        parallel = TRUE,
        cores = n_cores,
        seed = SEED
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("    Lexicon IFE ERROR: ", e$message)
      NULL
    })

    if (!is.null(out_lex)) {
      saveRDS(out_lex, lex_path)
      message("    Lexicon IFE ATT = ", round(out_lex$att.avg, 4))
    }
    rm(out_lex); gc()
  } else {
    message("  Lexicon IFE already exists, skipping.")
  }

  rm(panel); gc()
}

message("\n\nAll fect models complete.")
```

## Results summary

```{r results-summary}
# Extract ATT from fect models (bootstrap SE)
extract_att <- function(model, label) {
  att <- as.numeric(model$att.avg)
  # Defensive: check that bootstrap output exists before computing SE
  se <- if (!is.null(model$att.avg.boot) && length(model$att.avg.boot) > 1) {
    sd(model$att.avg.boot)
  } else {
    NA_real_
  }
  data.table(
    Model = label,
    ATT = round(att, 4),
    SE = round(se, 4),
    CI_lower = round(att - 1.96 * se, 4),
    CI_upper = round(att + 1.96 * se, 4),
    p_value = round(2 * pnorm(-abs(att / se)), 4)
  )
}

for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  message("\n--- ", fig$name, " ---")

  results_list <- list()
  for (method in c("ife", "mc", "fe")) {
    model_path <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_", method, "_", fig_key, ".rds"))
    if (file.exists(model_path)) {
      m <- readRDS(model_path)
      label <- switch(method, ife="IFE", mc="Matrix Completion", fe="Two-Way FE")
      results_list[[method]] <- extract_att(m, label)
      rm(m); gc()
    }
  }

  if (length(results_list) > 0) {
    results <- rbindlist(results_list)
    print(results)
  }
}
```
